description: Schema for per-repetition result JSON generated by the experiment runner for textual (LLM-judged) tasks.

task_id.description: Task identifier parsed from docs/tasks/<task>.md metadata.

task_type.description: Task type parsed from metadata (expected: textual).

task_path.description: Filesystem path to the task markdown used for this run.

sol_path.description: Filesystem path to the solution markdown with rubric JSON.

agent_role.description: Role used for the run (expert or beginner).

model.description: LLM model selected for this repetition (after overrides).

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition finished.

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the repetition.

attempts.description: Number of attempts within the repetition (includes retries).

history.description: List of parsed agent responses for each attempt, in order.

final_answer.description: Parsed agent response from the last attempt (answer, reasoning, confidence).

verdict.description: Correctness verdict based on judge rubric score (correct or wrong).

judge_score.description: Judge output plus derived fields like normalized_score.

*_score.description: Per-criterion score fields defined by the task rubric.

total_score.description: Total rubric score; computed if missing.

tokens.description: Token usage metadata from Ollama if available; fields may be null.

agent_in.description: Prompt tokens for the agent call.

agent_out.description: Completion tokens for the agent call.

judge_in.description: Prompt tokens for the judge call.

judge_out.description: Completion tokens for the judge call.
